costDistribution.note: Unit-cost proxy for offline routing comparison only; this is not provider billing data.

fallback.note: This T1-inclusive 10-sample report uses the code-level heuristic routing rule from PromptFeatureExtractor/HeuristicQualityTierClassifier. It does not exercise ONNX fallback execution, so fallback remains 0 by construction.
